---
applyTo: ["**"]
description: "Rules for GitHub Copilot pull request description generation."
---

# Pull Request Description Instructions

- Start with a concise factual summary of what changed.
- Include validation evidence, including exact commands when available.
- Call out memory, routing, workflow, security, or release impacts when present.
- State known residual risks and rollback notes for governance or automation
  changes.
- Keep descriptions factual and repository-grounded.
- Do not invent issue links, screenshots, test results, reviewers, or deployment
  status.
- Do not include secrets, raw logs, private payloads, environment values, or
  personal data.
